text: Action: During a conflict at this province, discard one or more cards from your hand. Choose an equal number of attacking characters - dishonor each of those characters.
name: Dishonorable Assault

text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose another unbroken province - turn that province facedown.
flavorText: "We are meant to hunt and ride free, not stay tethered to Khanbulak like an ox on a string." - Moto Rurame
name: Untamed Steppe

text: Keeper role only. During conflicts at this province, characters cannot have their skills increased by the effects of event cards.
name: Festival of the Departed

text: Disguised Bushi. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a character card in the attacked province - that character contributes its printed [conflict-military] skill towards your side during the resolution of this conflict.
name: Hiruma Yoshino

text: Reaction: After you gain a fate from a ring during a conflict in which this character is participating - this character cannot be chosen as the target of your opponent's triggered abilities until the end of the conflict.
name: Kitsuki Yuikimi

text: Immune to opponent's ring effects. Interrupt: When another character would leave play - remove 1 fate from this character instead.
flavorText: Heedless of her own fate, Kaede chose. With that choice, a sould was rent and a destiny altered.
name: Akodo Kaede

flavorText: "If the Isawa cannot be at peace, then of what value is my blade? If I would not die to uphold my oath, then of what value is my word? If you think me faithless, then your know nothing of the Shiba."
name: Valiant Oathkeeper

text: Each dishonored character you control gains sincerity.
flavorText: "Yet surely it cannot be one of my origami moths in the lord's kitchens - I have never set foot there. Unless you mean to suggest that my origami can fly?"
name: Yogo Preserver

text: Courtesy. (When this character leaves play, gain 1 fate.) Reaction: After this character wins a conflict - you and your opponent each gain 1 honor.
flavorText: With compassion and patience, the Ide turn trade into friendship, and friendship into alliance.
name: Benevolent Ambassador

text: Each honored character you control gets +1 glory. Each dishonored character you control gets -1 glory. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, discard a card from your hand. Choose another participating character - honor that character.
name: Utaku Rumaru

text: Fire role only. Action: During a conflict, choose any number of participating Bushi characters you control - double the base [conflict-military] skill of each of those characters until the end of the conflict. At the end of the conflict, sacrifice each of those characters.
name: Fury of the Damned

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel – your opponent may dishonor his or her character to refuse the duel. Otherwise, resolve the duel. Bow and move home the duel's loser.
flavorText: Yuuhisa immediately regretted asking who had requested the historical records.
name: Arbiter of Authority

text: Void role only. Attached character gains the Bushi and Courtier traits.
flavorText: With your new name, you leave childhood behind and begin your service to your lord
name: A New Name

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel – your opponent may dishonor his or her character to refuse the duel. Otherwise, resolve the duel. Discard the duel's loser.
name: Duel to the Death

text: Water role only. Reaction: After honor dials are revealed for a duel, if this character is involved in the duel - double this character's base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skills until the end of the phase.
name: Niten Pupil

text: Attach to a Bushi character. While there are exactly 2 Weapon attachments on attached character, attached character gains covert.
flavorText:
"One man, one sword, one strike." - Kakita
 "Two hands." - Mirumoto
name: Two-Heavens Technique

text: Air Role only. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a character in your dynasty discard pile - put that character into play in the conflict. If that character is still in play at the end of the conflict, put it on the bottom of your dynasty deck.
name: Forebearer's Echoes

text: [clan-crab] and [clan-phoenix] only. Disguised Shugenja. Action: During a conflict, remove one or more characters in your dynasty discard pile from the game - look at that many random cards from your opponent's hand. Choose and discard one of those cards.
name: Isawa Tadaka

text: Earth role only. Reaction: After a character an opponent controls is readied - bow that character.
flavorText: "I used to look up to the heavens, but the earth seems to have decided it wants that position."
name: Earth Becomes Sky

text: Fire role only. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a character your opponent controls in his or her home. Your opponent selects one - either move that character to the conflict, or dishonor it.
name: Alluring Patron

text: Attached character cannot ready unless its controller discards the top 3 cards of his or her conflict deck.
flavorText: "I wish you luck on your return to court."
name: Softskin

text: Earth role only. Action: Choose any number of characters with no fate that have a total printed cost of 6 or lower - ready each of those characters.
name: Unfulfilled Duty
